programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo
programme.desc: Talbot Breech is short, fussy and the insane inventor of a shrinking ray. His hobby is to miniaturize the biggest ships afloat; only today, he's caught Michelangelo in his diabolical ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello Makes Time
programme.desc: Donatello's newest invention, the Time Stopper, has fallen into the hands of unconventional scientist Lloyd Cycloyd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Farewell, Lotus Blossom
programme.desc: Using a devious deception, Shredder tricks Lotus Blossom into fighting the Turtles for possession of the burial urn of Chakahachi, an ancient Japanese magician.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Fin
programme.desc: In a dark plot to rule the world, Dr. Polidorius has created a man-fish using an evolution accelerator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rhino-Man
programme.desc: When multi-billionaire J. Gordon Hungerdunger sponsors a superhero competition, the city goes crazy with good guys.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman
programme.desc: Meet Bugman: he's Michelangelo's favourite comic book mutant superhero of all time. And today, he's real and in trouble.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Poor Little Rich Turtle
programme.desc: Desperate for the formula to Shellhammer Chemical's super rocket fuel, Krang and Shredder send Rocksteady and Bebop to kidnap poor little rich brat Buffy Shellhammer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): What's Michelangelo Good For?
programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (1970)
programme.desc: A passionate adaptation of Emily Brontë’s superbly strange and hauntingly enduring classic novel, starring Timothy Dalton and Anna Calder-Marshall as the doomed and deathless lovers, Heathcliff and Cathy. Directed by Robert Fuest.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Legends of Poker
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues from the legendary Bicycle Hotel & Casino in Los Angeles.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Legends of Poker Part 3
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues from the legendary Bicycle Hotel & Casino in Los Angeles.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Borgata Poker Open
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues from Borgata Hotel Casino & Spa with more than 1,000 entries and a prize pool of $3.2 million.

programme.title: Clockwatchers
programme.desc: The relationship between four female temps all working for the same credit company is threatened with the arrival of a new hire, who lands a permanent position one of the women was vying for.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: Two gun toting hoodlums, Trigger (Mickey Rooney) & Leo (Dick Emery) are hired by the unscrupulous J.K. (Peter Cook) to kidnap his niece Victoria. What follows is lunacy on a scale rarely seen!

programme.title: The Ape
programme.desc: Dr. Bernard Adrian is a kindly mad scientist who seeks to cure a young woman's polio. He needs spinal fluid from a human to complete the formula for his experimental serum.

programme.title: The Ape Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist accidentally turns himself into a half ape, half human creature, and scrambles to find a cure.

programme.title: Ghost in the Noonday Sun
programme.desc: In the 17th century, a pirate captain is murdered by his cook after he buries his treasure and marks it on a map but the poor-memory cook must rely on the captain's ghost to re-track the loot, since the map was drawn in disappearing ink.

programme.title: Son Of The Pink Panther
programme.desc: Blake Edwards directs this romantic high-adventure that has Inspector Clouseau's illegitimate (and alarmingly similar!) son (Roberto Benigni) botching a mission to rescue a kidnapped princess (Debrah Farentino).

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A girl helps Hey Soos, who has disobeyed orders, regain the favor of his bosses.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Gil Favor and his drovers fight to save a mentally disturbed woman from being burned as a witch by the Cheyenne Indians.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Three brothers mistake Wishbone for their sister's fiancé and try to strong-arm him into marriage.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Wishbone becomes blind after a bad fall from a steep cliff, saving him only by desperate grab at a convenient bush.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A beautiful woman whose possessions include a porcelain tub, a suit of armor and four Scottish bulls is rescued by Rowdy and Quince.

programme.title: Sky Kids
programme.desc: As a pair of schoolboys sneak a look around an empty private aircraft, two criminals take off with the kids still inside. Upon discovering the men are dangerous gangsters, the horrified lads inadvertently become embroiled in the mobsters's scheme.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: The Crocodile Hunter (Steve Irwin) is trying to save a feisty croc from poachers. What he doesn't know is that the crocodile has swallowed a top secret U.S. satellite beacon, and the poachers are actually American special agents sent to retrieve it.

programme.title: Inferno: Skyscraper Escape
programme.desc: Disaster hits when two teenagers are caught in a fire on the 20th floor of a skyscraper. Their parents are on the 60th. Will they survive the flames?

programme.title: Murder In The Vineyard
programme.desc: Life is amazing for Emma and her teenage daughter Beatrice when they move from the big city to an idyllic small town, but then Beatrice is hazed at a party one night by mysterious bullies. Emma sets out to find who the culprit is.

programme.title: Stranger At The Door
programme.desc: The parents (Linda Purl and Perry King) of an adopted son (Andrew Kraulis) do not know how to react when their son returns home after several years with bad intentions.

programme.title: Twin Betrayal
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, Julia, a troubled woman, moves to Los Angeles with her new boyfriend. After settling into a new home, mysterious things begin to happen. It's not long before Julia becomes convinced that her demons have moved with her.

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: Fighting The Sky
programme.desc: Researchers track down the origin of other-worldly sounds.

programme.title: Merlin and the War of the Dragons
programme.desc: An army of dragons invade the crippled English countryside and the apprentice wizard Merlin must confront the fire-breathing beasts.

programme.title: Wish Upon a Star: Wish Upon a Star (1996)
programme.desc: In this cult classic, younger sister Hayley Wheaton (Danielle Harris) wishes to switch places with her popular older sister Alexia (Katherine Heigl) and the two bickering siblings awaken to find the wish has come true.

programme.title: The Great Alaskan Race
programme.desc: In this incredible true story, widowed father Leonhard travels 700 miles across treacherous ice with only his sled dogs for company, to deliver the anti-toxin to the hospital, after a deadly diphtheria outbreak hits the small Alaskan town of Nome in 1925.

programme.title: The Frog Prince
programme.desc: A young British girl journeys to Paris to go to college, and is determined to find the man of her dreams and fall madly in love. However, things don't work out quite the way she planned.

programme.title: Time Toys
programme.desc: A group of kids stumble upon a chest full of toys from the future. The discovery takes them on an adventure using their new-found toys to save their neighbourhood and the world from a maniacal madman. A fun, futuristic adventure for all the family.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Moving Violations
programme.desc: (S05E003) Jane and Sydney escape when Jane hits Richard in the gut with a shovel. As a deputy is driving Jane and Syd to meet Samantha, they see Richard come out of a grocery store. Richard is killed in a shootout.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Hunka, Hunka Burnin Love
programme.desc: (S05E004) Peter fires Sydney after learning that she sold his house (which he had listed as a company asset) to pay the practice's debts. Peter has to move into Amanda's apartment.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Un-Janed Melody
programme.desc: (S05E005) Jane saves Jake and Alison from the fire. Jane apologizes for her outburst but later tries to seduce Billy to make the couple jealous.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Jane's Addiction
programme.desc: (S05E006) Jane slashes Alison's tires. Jake catches Jane following Alison and him and orders her to stop stalking them. Jane files a restraining order against Jake.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Young Doctors in Heat
programme.desc: (S05E007) Amanda and Peter continue to fight constantly. Peter decides to stay with Michael and Kimberly for a while.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: When they rescue a young prince from an uprising that kills the rest of his family, Dylan and Tyr are asked to be his advisors.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan and his new Commonwealth fleet take on the Drago-Kazov fleet but find it much larger than expected.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The Magog eggs in Harper are starting to hatch, so the team builds a Teseract machine.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan takes over a tourist barge in an attempt to escape mercenaries.

programme.title: Andromeda: Be All My Sins Remembered
programme.desc: A body identification goes awry when it turns out Beka's former crewmate isn't dead at all.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Planes, Cranes and Automobiles
programme.desc: Beat takes on his biggest build this season, a 15,000 square foot mansion with logs so massive they tax the crane and crew to the limits.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Good As New
programme.desc: On a two-man build in Alberta, Joel and his right-hand man Shawn are challenged by broken logs and stubborn headers.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Barn Burner
programme.desc: After Beat and Sam build a beautiful home in Alberta, the clients egg them on to a paint ball battle on their acreage.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Timber Kings: Behind the Sawdust
programme.desc: Timber Kings: Behind the Sawdust captures the world’s best log home craftsmen like never before! This one-hour special takes you behind the scenes.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cliffside Castle
programme.desc: Beat takes on one of the most perilous builds of his career, a luxury twin-turreted vacation home on the edge of 100-foot cliff.

programme.title: Wild At Heart
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes and the Trevanians have to decide what future lies ahead of them in these difficult times.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: It's a year since we left Leopard's Den and much has changed. The animal hospital has been rebuilt and is now up and running. It's a big day for all the family as Danny has been fighting for custody of Evan and today they will learn the judge's decision.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny and Evan's life on the run doesn't start well when Danny falls asleep at the wheel and drives into a ditch. They have to enlist a local farmer, Johann, to winch them out.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Danny is asked by the State Vet to help control an outbreak of rabies in the National Park. When Vanessa is concerned for the animals at Mara, Danny assures her it's a long way away and advises her to continue with business as usual.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: It's the day before Rosie's wedding. Danny is proud of his daughter and determined to feed her up now that she's eating for two. All the family are excited about the imminent return of Caroline, especially Du Plessis who can't wait to see his fiancé.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Death Cell
programme.desc: An escaped mental patient comes to Peter, asking for his help in getting her fiancͩ cleared of a murder charge as he awaits execution.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Vanishing Evidence
programme.desc: A European spy kills a British professor and steals vital papers. M.I.5 recruits Peter to go to to Amsterdam and recover the scientific research.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Prize
programme.desc: In Scandinavia, at a prize-awarding ceremony, Peter must rescue a writer being held for speaking out against her repressive government.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Flight into Darkness
programme.desc: Dr. Stephens believes his anti-gravity research will endanger mankind; he destroys the papers and disappears. Brady is summoned to track him down.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Decoy
programme.desc: Identical twins Toni and Terry Trent are a popular musical act, performing for the troops on a USO tour of Britain. Brady volunteers to help Toni when Terry disappears at a Soho hotel where she had earlier witnessed a murder.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Invisible Knife
programme.desc: March must solve the mystery of how a man could be stabbed to death by an invisible knife, while attempting to summon The Devil during a black rite.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Strange Event at Roman Fall
programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: The Most Wanted Man (REDUX)
programme.desc: The crew hunt a man whom everyone wants to capture, a man with the longest criminal record they've ever seen, and special powers that allow him to escape again and again.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: The Half dense Players (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante is assigned to take custody of an unusual murder suspect, a beautiful artist plagued by strange visions that may threaten reality itself.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: A Dark and Stormy Night (REDUX)
programme.desc: Darius reconciles with Luc, while making peace with Dante, but the sinister forces that follow him are not far behind.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Supermax (REDUX)

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: A Twist in Time (REDUX)

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Eat Sin (REDUX)
programme.desc: Under the effects of a space/time warp, members of the Tulip's crew find themselves alone in their own parallel universe, dealing with a separate version of their marauding psychopathic prisoner, "Five."

programme.title: Holiday Joy
programme.desc: A shy high school student's Christmas wish comes true only it isn't exactly as wonderful as she'd hoped.

programme.title: Belle's Christmas Gift
programme.desc: Alesha hates Christmas so she reluctantly agrees to visit her Caribbean grandmother to help organize her annual Christmas charity function to save her clinic. When she arrives with her best friend, Alesha meets a handsome Brit, Garrett Graham.

programme.title: Christmas In The City
programme.desc: After closing down her family business, Wendy and her daughter move to the city for a job in the toy department. Her excitement is short lived when the store's consultant ruins the holiday spirit by replacing Santa with a male underwear model.

programme.title: Holiday Twist
programme.desc: Tender thought provoking story of overcoming adversity through intertwining lives that ultimately ends on a magical journey to save Christmas and each other.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: From Here to Maturity
programme.desc: Oscar faces a personal dilemma when he dates a young nanny, Allyson (Brianne Howey) who works for his neighbor, Charlotte (Teri Hatcher).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Madison & Son
programme.desc: Oscar's dream comes true when he is asked to throw out the first pitch at a New York Mets game.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Oscar's Overture

programme.title: The Odd Couple: An Oscar Named Desire

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A man incriminates himself when he falls in cement while trying to transport a dead body.

programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The inner city neighborhood of Jamestown is throwing a streetball tournament; the probability of violence is high; staff sergeant Frank Best knows the neighborhood well; he grew up on those streets and knows many of the bad guys by name.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Traci's first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a drunken bachelorette party is involved in a fatal accident; Jerry discovers the driver of the other vehicle was murdered before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Estranged mother Claire, a woman who abandons Andy and her father 15 years ago; forced to work with the woman who deserted her, Andy begins dissecting the secrets of a family in turmoil; Sam, Nick, Chris and Gail race to find a desperate mother.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A remorseless, uncaring scientist (Stephen Lang) and his partner (Michael Ontkean) discover a way to bring life back to the recently deceased. But after the scientist is killed and brought back to life himself, will he choose to live differently?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Brilliant geneticist Martin Nodel (Ron Rifkin) unlocks a secret code imprinted on human DNA. But when he tests this code on himself, his instincts draw him to a remote location where he finds a trip…to The Outer Limits. Ryan Reynolds co-stars.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When it is not known if aliens headed to Earth are friend or foe, five people are placed in secret bunkers to man switches that, if not pressed at specified intervals, will set off mass destruction that will destroy everything, alien or human alike.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Engaged as soldiers on a distant planet to prevent a race of alien bugs from stealing minerals that provide the Earth's energy, a woman (Christine Elise) and her troops accidentally discover that the real enemy may not be the aliens at all.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a seemingly harmless audio signal from space causes physiological changes in Earth's youth, a young scientist races against time to discover what exactly is happening and why. Could the changes be necessary for the survival of the planet?

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Dueling Skates
programme.desc: It's the biggest, funniest roller marathon ever when Mork takes to skates for the first time to race a cheating champion skater down a Rocky Mountain peak into Boulder to save the day care center at which he works from destruction.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork the Prankster
programme.desc: Spaceman Mork gets so cosmically carried away with pulling practical jokes that he surprises Mindy by assembling her jeep in their living room right over Mr. Bickley's apartment - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork, The Monkey's Uncle
programme.desc: Mork turns the apartment he shares with Mindy into a hilarious hideaway for a young chimpanzee that he kidnaps from the Boulder zoo in the mistaken belief that the animal's mother has been abducted.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork's New Look
programme.desc: Mork sends the face-lifting business into orbit when he hilariously rushes to a plastic surgeon to shoot the works after Mindy gives Mork the idea that everyone could use a little improverrent on Mork & Mindy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork and The Bum Rap
programme.desc: Naive Mork puts on his own out-of-this-world telethon to help Mindy raise charity funds, but is such a funny failure at fund-raising that he turns to his own outrageous brand of panhandling to come up with the needed money.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: There's A New Mork In Town
programme.desc: Mork faces almost unbeatable competition for his job as official Earth observer from his Orkan hero, the suave and charming Xerko, who beams to Earth to challenge Mork to an outrageous contest for the right to send reports back to Ork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork Meets Robin Williams

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mindy, Mindy, Mindy

programme.desc: This episode includes: Elvis' Last Night, Skunk Ape, Murdered Heiress & UD and Haunting on 37th Street.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Larry's Last Race & UD, UD: Til Death Do Us Part, Millionairess Murder & UD and Dances With Moomess & UD.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Patricia is terrorized by a ghost who escapes from the pages of an antique book. Susie feels she has made the biggest mistake of her life but finds forgiveness and unconditional love from the spirit of her grandmother.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Jerry Stiller receives a long awaited message from his father; a maternal figure appears to Mindy McCready at one of the darkest moments of her life.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Lorenzo Lamas comes face to face with the spirit of a famous actress who is trying to contact his mother. Charles Schaughnessy encounters an angry poltergiest.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Jordan uncovers an unsolved crime scene with the help of the menacing spirit of the murder victim; Adrienne witnesses her deceased grandmother comforting her dying mother and later discovers they have been reunited in the afterlife.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Faced with a decision that would change his life, Bret Michaels is visited by a close relative who points him toward his destiny.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: A protective spirit saves Brett Butler from an abusive relationship; a murdered man threatens Cassandra Peterson's life in her own home; lonely spirits stalk Phil Varone.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Following the gruesome discovery of a skeleton transported by water on an island, several detectives are challenged as they seek to unravel the unsolved mystery of the woman with no name.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Lady Killer
programme.desc: Investigators find the parallels between the two cases troubling: two young, isolated and vulnerable Guyanese women, two deaths in strange circumstances, two life insurance policies. Will Mohammed Khan escape justice again?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Bathtub Sisters
programme.desc: The mother of two teenaged girls is found dead in her bathtub. The coroner declares it an accidental death, but a year later, new information prompt the police to reopen the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who Did This?
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA Shockers
programme.desc: Monique and Ashley find out who their newborn babies' fathers are on today's Steve Wilkos Show!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Proof Of Innocence
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Trust
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Natural Witness
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Vowes
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce  with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.desc: A family living in a Revolutionary War era house in Pennsylvania fears for their child and urgently calls on the TAPS team for help.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Don't Go Chasing Waterfalls Episode
programme.desc: To try to give his career a jumpstart, Spencer goes after signing a notorious bad-boy performer, but he has his hands full when the singer isn't as reformed as he led people to believe.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big My Life And Kids Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee is torn when she gets a date with a great man whom she admires, but she discovers he is divorced with two kids. At first, she rejects the idea of dating him, but she reconsiders and has a great time with his family.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Thanks For Nothing Episode
programme.desc: High drama occurs and secrets are revealed at Dee Dee's Thanksgiving party when Spencer's father, Ray, shows up unexpectedly. Mona comes clean to her father about her feelings of being slighted by him and Phyllis rethinks her relationship with Ray.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Parent Trap Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee musters up the courage to finally introduce her new boyfriend, the older Morris, to her parents. Though Charles and Big Dee Dee publicly approve, privately they try to get Dee Dee to break it off.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Home Is Where The Car Is Episode
programme.desc: When Mona discovers that her new boyfriend is living in his car, she sets out to prove that she's not so shallow that it makes a difference. Meanwhile, Phyllis puts her war with Big Dee Dee on hold to help her weather a health scare.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big All Bets Are Off Episode
programme.desc: Mona, Dee Dee, Phyllis and Big Dee Dee have trouble getting along when they all play poker together at Mona's apartment. When Dee Dee loses to Mona she has a hard time accepting that she may not be the best at something.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Credit Check Episode
programme.desc: Mona gets upset when her boss, Kai, seems to take all the credit for the Delicious Records talent search. However Kai explains that she will have to take the fall if the promotion fails, so she has to take control.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Fast Track Episode, Part I
programme.desc: Mona has trouble getting producers to judge the Delicious Talent contest that she is overseeing and Dee Dee loses the position she thought she had at her law firm.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Everybody Hate Monica
programme.desc: Joan (Tracee Ellis Ross) learns that Maya (Golden Brooks) and Lynn (Persia White) did not tell her about a recent outing they had with Toni, who was in town for a brief visit.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Hustle & Dough
programme.desc: In trying to seriously pursue her music career, Lynn (Persia White) informs the girls that she is performing at a local club during open mic night.

programme.title: Girlfriends: If You Can't Stand the Heat, Get Out of the Boonies
programme.desc: Maya (Golden Brooks) discovers Jabari (Kendre Berry) has been skipping school and plagiarized a major writing assignment.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hell's Gate

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Tatton Hall
programme.desc: Something about Tatton Old Hall keeps bringing the Most Haunted team back. Something happens that stops two of the team entering, a poltergeist causes confusion and the team get a clear voice from beyond the veil.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1 of this terrifying place concentrates above ground. The team are alarmed at the results from a new piece of equipment and Yvette meets her match.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The Most Haunted team explore the underground of Fort Paull. With its foundations and footprint dating back 100’s of years the team are faced with some terrifying ordeals.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Annison Funeral Parlour
programme.desc: Coffins, murder and a malevolent spirit plague the team as they investigate this one-time funeral home. With one member isolated alone another in a coffin the team catch a poltergeist in action

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice

programme.title: Dynasty: The Testimony
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Blake maintains his innocence; Matthew learns of Claudia's affair with Steven; Claudia and daughter Lindsay are involved in an automobile accident; The prosecution calls in a mysterious witness that Blake is surprised to see.

programme.title: Dynasty: Enter Alexis
programme.desc: Blake's first wife Alexis testifies that Blake is capable of violence; Matthew takes off with Lindsay; Alexis tells Steven of her love for him; the jury announces they have reached a verdict.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Verdict
programme.desc: Blake is found guilty; Krystle reunites with her husband; Blake strikes Steven; a pregnant Krystle suffers a fall; Alexis moves onto the Carrington estate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After being paralysed as a teenager, Robert met Ashleigh online and they fell in love. With news he may not have much longer to live, Robert asks Nev and Max to bring Ashleigh to him. (S6, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Robin is desperate to meet her hunky, long-distance love in person. Nev and Max agree to help her hunt him down, but what they uncover turns out to be much more than Robin bargained for! (S6, ep17)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jasmine writes to Nev and Max asking for help for a "friend". But they're perplexed when Jasmine drops a bombshell revelation: they've helped her friend before! (S6, ep19)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny & Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Game of Chess
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Emerald
programme.desc: The IMF is assigned to recover microfilm plans for manipulating international gold reserves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jim Phelps comes to the aid of a personal friend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Counterfeiter
programme.desc: Destroying a drug ring is the task of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Town
programme.desc: IMF leader Jim Phelps is marked for murder.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Catch My Drift?
programme.desc: The guys land a custom drift car and a luxury antiques unit that could have a one-of-a-kind pilot pistol from WWI. While trying to track down the provenance of the gun, Ton's lead foot gets them into trouble at their car sale.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whiskey Business
programme.desc: An auction in Allen's old stomping grounds triggers memories of being a "lone wolf." The guys find a set of RC race boats and when they buy a man-cave unit full of old whiskey, a night of partying leads to some tough sales.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hall of Fame Game
programme.desc: Allen heads to an auction with Elle, while Ton and Big Sis revamp the shop to help bring in more customers. Allen unearths a Ouija board and a set of antique basketballs, and goes toe-to-toe with an NBA Hall of Famer.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Party Gras
programme.desc: On a trip to New Orleans, Ton and Allen look to mix business with pleasure. They wage war with some locals at a tough auction, win a Mardi Gras unit that contains a confetti blaster and a modern calliope, then hit the town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails
programme.desc: CJ seeks to disrupt Allen's search for serenity at a storage auction before the guy's head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip n' slide, and a bed of nails.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: This Can Go One of Two Ways
programme.desc: Barbara flies to New York to meet with Jace's dad. Adam's parents break the rules of their custody agreement. Lux's dad surprises Kailyn at Lincoln's birthday party after a big fight. (S9, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Things Come to an End
programme.desc: Leah and Corey finalize their divorce, Chelsea's father learns that she is living with Adam; Jenelle goes against her lawyer's advice; Kailyn sees a picture of Jo and his girlfriend. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom: Family Bonds
programme.desc: Farrah contacts Sophia's dad's family in an attempt to get social security benefits. Maci tells Ryan she's moving to Nashville, and Catelynn and Tyler learn Butch is back in jail.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: No looking back
programme.desc: Leah gets the results of Ali's MRI and is relieved to find out there's nothing wrong with her brain. Meanwhile, Jenelle is spending time with Jace and finally at peace with her mum.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Deja Vu
programme.desc: Leah struggles with Addie missing her father, Jenelle and Nathan face off in court over custody of Kaiser, and Kailyn starts summer school with some extra help from Jo.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Dot Dot Dot

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman: The Unstoppable Flying Scotsman

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: How the Railways Won the War

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: Steam Is Dead, Long Live the Railways
programme.desc: The dying days of steam, and how the railways fought back.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Ainsley's Caribbean Kitchen

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: CBS Morning News
programme.desc: This morning newscast covers the day's top stories with context and depth, featuring live breaking news coverage and original reporting from CBS News correspondents around the globe.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7 Mornings
programme.desc: Watch the free CBS News 24/7 live stream for breaking news & in-depth reporting.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Snow Biz/Bugged
programme.desc: Winter hits Elwood City and Arthur sees dollar signs! His snow-shoveling business is booming--that is, until Buster decides to get in on the action. And, Brain can be a know-it-all, and sometimes he really bugs people.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Imaginary Friend/Arthur's Lost Library Book
programme.desc: Someone only D.W. can see has moved in with the Reads. Her name is Nadine, and she follows D.W. everywhere. Arthur is the first to get the new Scare-Your-Pants-Off book from the library. Unfortunately, he can't figure out where he put it!

programme.title: Arthur: George Scraps His Sculpture/Arthur's Big Meltdown
programme.desc: George creates a piece of art for the county-wide art show with the help of guest artist Kevin Sampson. Then, Arthur must learn how to control his temper after getting angry over a pair of sneakers!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tv-Free Week/Night Fright
programme.desc: The kids and parents of Ellwood City have all pledged not to watch TV for one whole week. Can they last? Then, big, brave Binky Barnes would be toast if people ever discovered he can't sleep without a night light.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Art Expert/Arthur's Lucky Pencil
programme.desc: It's a nightmare--Arthur and Buster have to work with Binky. On an art project! I mean, what does a bully like Binky know about art? Then, Arthur discovers the secret to success--a pencil that brings good luck to whoever possesses it.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Horns George/Bleep
programme.desc: George is inspired to write and perform his own blues song when he's introduced to the music of Koko Taylor. And, D.W. overhears a mysterious word she doesn’t know the meaning of. Can D.W. risk the consequences of blurting out <"BLEEP!">?

programme.title: Arthur: Muffy's Art Attack/Tales from the Crib
programme.desc: When Muffy sees a kinetic sculptor’s machines, she brags that she can make even better ones. Then, Vicita is upset at having to trade in her cherished crib for a big-girl bed, so D.W. shares her story of that same rite of passage.

programme.title: Arthur: The Wheel Deal/The Buster Report
programme.desc: After an injury, Brain has to spend some time using a wheelchair. Will he be able to compete in a basketball tournament for charity? The kids are assigned to write a report on someone they admire, and George picks….Buster!

programme.title: Arthur: Unfinished/D.W., Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Arthur is completely riveted by a book and can't wait to see how it ends. But the last few pages are missing! Now what? For D.W., there's nothing better than getting her own way--that is, until all her friends stop playing with her.

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: The US Army Air Corps was still flying bi-planes in the 1930s but would darken the skies over enemy cities with its might.

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: From the smoldering wreckage of Pearl Harbor to final victory, this is the story of the US Navy and the two ocean war.

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: The Marines are America's fighting elite, a small police force that grew into one of the most feared forces in the Pacific War.

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: This is the story of the creation of the Allied military from the small 100,000-man force of the post World War I era to the mighty military industrial complex that fought fascist forces around the world. 10 Hour Series

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: The US Coast Guard was the first branch of the US military to see action in WWII.

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: The US Coast Guard saw extensive action throughout the Second World War, battling U-boats within sight of mainland America.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bunches of Boxes!
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek takes a turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park!/BJ and Riff engage in a friendly contest to see which of them can find the loudest sound in the park.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: Guns That Changed The Game: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: Rise of the Machines: While the single shot rifle remained a mainstay until WWI, machine guns had been in development since the final days of the American Civil War.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Mosquito: The Wooden Wonder
programme.desc: We trace the astonishing story of designers turning away from metal and back to wood to create a twin-engine bomber that could outrun almost any aircraft in the sky, yet deliver a bomb load greater than an Avro Lancaster.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts
programme.desc: Having stolen billions from the populace, Ukrainian dictator Viktor Yanukovych hides his treasure trove in a mind-bending corruption scheme that leads to Mezhyhirya. But will his hideout keep him safe from the people’s wrath?

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: Ju52: Explore classic and underrated aircraft, from WWII fighters to the Screaming Eagles F4, showcasing aviation's evolving history.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: July 1943. For six months, the German advance has stalled, but Hitler is convinced that his new generation of Nazi tanks will help put the Reich back on the path to European domination. His target: the Soviet town of Kursk.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra
programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!
programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting
programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo
programme.desc: Investigating reports of UFOs in the country town of High Falls, April uncovers a real scheme.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: Of Mice and Men
programme.desc: John Malkovich, Gary Sinise and Sherilyn Fenn shine in this contemporary remake of the beloved classic about a nomadic farm worker who looks after his dimwitted, gentle-giant friend.

programme.title: Zookeeper: Zookeeper (2011)
programme.desc: The animals at one particular zoo decide to break their code of silence in order to help their lovable zookeeper gain the attention of one particular woman.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Borgata Poker Open
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues from Borgata Hotel Casino & Spa with more than 1,000 entries and a prize pool of $3.2 million.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Borgata Poker Open - $3.2 Million Prize Pool
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues from Borgata Hotel Casino & Spa with more than 1,000 entries and a prize pool of $3.2 million.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: bestbet Bounty Scramble Part 1 of 3

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: Two gun toting hoodlums, Trigger (Mickey Rooney) & Leo (Dick Emery) are hired by the unscrupulous J.K. (Peter Cook) to kidnap his niece Victoria. What follows is lunacy on a scale rarely seen!

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: A crew of miniature aliens operate a spaceship that has a human form

programme.title: Son Of The Pink Panther
programme.desc: Blake Edwards directs this romantic high-adventure that has Inspector Clouseau's illegitimate (and alarmingly similar!) son (Roberto Benigni) botching a mission to rescue a kidnapped princess (Debrah Farentino).

programme.title: Blood on the Sun
programme.desc: A dedicated American reporter in 1930s Japan is determined to expose that government's plan for world domination.

programme.title: Over the Top
programme.desc: A Championship title, a huge cash award, and his son's love -- the greatest prize of all -- are at stake when Hawk battles his strongest enemy for everything he has ever wanted.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A beautiful woman whose possessions include a porcelain tub, a suit of armor and four Scottish bulls is rescued by Rowdy and Quince.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: The drovers face a full-scale war if the U.S. Army doesn't fulfill the terms of a treaty it made with an Apache Indian tribe.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: An orphanage operator sells some of Gil Favor's cattle, scattered by a storm, in the naive belief that they're strays.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor catches a horse thief who turns out to be a former friend of Wishbone, the camp cook.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A black-garbed man walks into the drovers' camp during a thunderstorm, but his clothing is absolutely dry.

programme.title: Inferno: Skyscraper Escape
programme.desc: Disaster hits when two teenagers are caught in a fire on the 20th floor of a skyscraper. Their parents are on the 60th. Will they survive the flames?

programme.title: Spy Next Door
programme.desc: A former CIA agent hoping to settle down with his girlfriend uses an opportunity to babysit her children as a chance to win them over. However, things take a dramatic turn when an old enemy shows up, forcing him back into his old lifestyle.

programme.title: Rain
programme.desc: Set in 1968, a German Shepherd enrolled by his family in a training program that will send him to serve American soldiers in Vietnam. Even when Rain is wounded, he saves many, and bonds with a soldier who learns much from this very special dog.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: A meteorologist sets out to derail the top secret weather-manipulating program he mistakenly became a part of.

programme.title: Twin Betrayal
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, Julia, a troubled woman, moves to Los Angeles with her new boyfriend. After settling into a new home, mysterious things begin to happen. It's not long before Julia becomes convinced that her demons have moved with her.

programme.title: Dying to Belong
programme.desc: A Freshman college student believes there was foul play behind another Sorority member's apparent suicide.

programme.title: Grandma Dearest
programme.desc: A psychotic woman goes to murderous lengths to protect her relationship with her new grandchildren.

programme.title: Sugar Baby Murder
programme.desc: After graduating from college, 21 year old Bridget moves to a new town with her best friend Lindsay. Desperately needing a job to support her budding writing career, she takes a job as an EA to business tycoon Anthony Gloss.

programme.title: Merlin and the War of the Dragons
programme.desc: An army of dragons invade the crippled English countryside and the apprentice wizard Merlin must confront the fire-breathing beasts.

programme.title: Apocalypse of Ice
programme.desc: Already in the throes of a viral pandemic, a massive polar vortex threatens to cover nearly all of Earth in ice.

programme.title: The Four Warriors
programme.desc: Travelling home, four soldiers discover a village gripped by fear, as residents are abducted by unknown predators. These warriors set out to rescue them and destroy what lurks outside the village.

programme.title: Time Toys
programme.desc: A group of kids stumble upon a chest full of toys from the future. The discovery takes them on an adventure using their new-found toys to save their neighbourhood and the world from a maniacal madman. A fun, futuristic adventure for all the family.

programme.title: The Care Bears Movie
programme.desc: The Care Bears leave their cloud home in Care-A-Lot to try and teach earthlings how to share their feelings of love and caring for each other.

programme.title: That's What I Am
programme.desc: In 1965, 13 y.o. paperboy Andy's paired up with a geek on a project in the popular junior high teacher's class. Andy learns and grows from it.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Young Doctors in Heat
programme.desc: (S05E007) Amanda and Peter continue to fight constantly. Peter decides to stay with Michael and Kimberly for a while.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Mission Interpersonal
programme.desc: (S05E008) Taylor reveals that she is the younger sister of Peter's late wife Beth. She hangs out with Peter while Amanda is away on a business trip, and helps him pick out a ring for her.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Farewell Mike's Concubine
programme.desc: (S05E009) Kimberly orders Megan to stop "servicing" Michael, but he refuses to stay away from her. Michael cuts off Megan's relationship with her clients.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Nice Work If You Can Get It
programme.desc: (S05E010) Craig takes the reins of D&D. Arthur pays Amanda to keep an eye on Craig so that the business can stay afloat until he resumes control.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Sole Sister
programme.desc: (S05E011) Kyle rejects Sydney and vows to make his marriage work. Jane also pushes Syd away as she searches for her birth mother. She learns that her mother is a former actress named Sherry (Larson) Doucette.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Quest for Mother
programme.desc: (S05E012) Kimberly rejects Michael's final attempt at a reconciliation. He decides to stay with Matt for a while, but Kimberly urges Megan to get Michael back. Dan pressures Matt to move in with him.

programme.title: Andromeda: Be All My Sins Remembered
programme.desc: A body identification goes awry when it turns out Beka's former crewmate isn't dead at all.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dance of the Mayflies
programme.desc: Andromeda rescues dying people from a drift, but they soon turn into zombies being controlled by a hive-mind.

programme.title: Andromeda: In Heaven Now Are Three
programme.desc: The engine of creation is capable of rewriting the universe according to the owner's wishes. Dylan, Beka and Trance must obtain it before someone with dark plans gets it.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Things We Cannot Change
programme.desc: A black hole knocks out Dylan and sends him into an alternative reality with a wife and child.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown
programme.desc: The crew rescues one of the long-lost founders of the Commonwealth, but discovers she may be more trouble than she is worth.

programme.title: Andromeda: Belly of the Beast
programme.desc: A mythological space monster tries to eat the Andromeda.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cliffside Castle
programme.desc: Beat takes on one of the most perilous builds of his career, a luxury twin-turreted vacation home on the edge of 100-foot cliff.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Bumper Farrell is on a mercy dash, leading a hay convoy into the eye of the storm.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A team of heavyweight champions drag a million dollar shed through the eye of a needle.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark Cromwell and the electricity switch room convoy run into freak weather.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: It's trial by fire for Russell McDonough, hauling a mobile building down a tricky track.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The Mackay Brothers hit the bush and try to dodge destruction.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: It's the day before Rosie's wedding. Danny is proud of his daughter and determined to feed her up now that she's eating for two. All the family are excited about the imminent return of Caroline, especially Du Plessis who can't wait to see his fiancé.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice and Danny are called out by a farmer who's trapped an African Wild Dog. As they're even more endangered than cheetahs and much more vicious, Danny and Alice are amazed to see one up close.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: When Du Plessis instructs the family to be around for dinner, they are intrigued to hear he's planning a big announcement. However, he won't be drawn on details and tells them to be patient.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alice and Danny are delighted when the Animal Hospital is given responsibility for the rescue and conservation of animals in the region – it's a big achievement after all their hard work.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are concerned about a missing male giraffe but Du Plessis is confident he can find him. He's as good as his word but they're upset to discover Mara lions have killed the giraffe.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Strange Event at Roman Fall
programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Headless Hat
programme.desc: While on holiday in France, there is a murder at the docks and Colonel March is asked by a friend of the French police to assist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Second Mona Lisa
programme.desc: The Second Mona Lisa,' painted six months after the first, is targeted by rival collectors. Colonel March is determined to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death In Inner Space
programme.desc: A scientist seeks a way to suspend bodily life functions during space travel, and his test subject dies from lack of oxygen. Accident or foul play?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Talking Head
programme.desc: A 12 year old boy insists his dead father told him to kill his mother's new fiancée. But did the father truly die in an accidental plane crash?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Devil Sells His Soul
programme.desc: Colonel March hypnotizes five people to solve the stabbing murder of Lord Telford, while he himself portrays the murder victim.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silent Vow
programme.desc: A customer dies from poisoned wine dining at a café, and the waiter falls under suspicion because he was a former chemist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death and the Other Monkey
programme.desc: A cancer research scientist believes his test monkey was not only stolen, but also replaced. He is later found dead from gas; suicide or not?

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Eat Sin (REDUX)

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Bad Girls (REDUX)
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite and his two daughters book the Tulip for a passage to Mars, Percy and the destructive young women become fast friends, creating serious trouble for Dante.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Bad Seed (REDUX)

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Travis (REDUX)

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Resurrection (REDUX)
programme.desc: Eccleston returns from "the other side" just as Raider forces attack the Tulip... on their way to destroy what is left of the Earth.

programme.title: Holiday Twist

programme.title: A Christmas Princess

programme.title: Christmas Harmony

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ex-Factor

programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Food Fight

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Taffy Days

programme.desc: Oscar and Felix seek the advice of a counselor in their apartment building to help overcome their issues.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the disappearance of a high-school cheerleader and her boyfriend.

programme.desc: Grissom and Greg investigate a drive-by shooting on a limo.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Lab technician Hodges convinces his colleagues that Grissom needs their help.

programme.desc: Watch the highlights from the match between Germany FR and France played at Ramón Sánchez-Pizjuán, Seville.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers

programme.desc: Partnered with a mysterious stranger (Dave Franco), a high school senior (Emma Roberts) joins a popular online game that dares players to perform increasingly dangerous stunts.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A despondent man finds himself torn between killing himself and killing his co-workers. Before he can do either, he's pulled into The Outer Limits where there are hundreds of versions of him, each with a different life and a different character.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A woman's life changes dramatically when she accidentally shoots herself in the head which causes her to not only grow more intelligent, but also to realize how dull her life was before the photo in a picture frame started talking to her.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When an incident at a space station leaves three people dead, the captain of the ship returns to Earth to face murder charges. Is the captain a murderous madman? Or has he actually seen the face of evil floating in the zero-gravity of deep space?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: The residents of a suburban neighborhood have their lives turned upside down when a four block section of their subdivision is ripped from the earth by a mysterious force and transported to a distant planet. David McCallum and Laura Harris star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Muckraking TV journalist Donald Rivers (Alan Thicke), host of The Whole Truth, has the show of a lifetime: rock solid-proof that the government and private defense contractors have been engaging in secret genetic cloning.
