programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael vs. The Volcano
programme.desc: Raphael, convinced he is dying due to a faulty reading by Donatell's Health-O-Meter, becomes do-gooder THE Green Defender, popping up around the city foiling crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Duplicate
programme.desc: Donatello creates an egotistical Clone of himself who stuffs Donatello in a trunk.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ice Creature Cometh
programme.desc: Bebop dumps a vat of mutagen into the Arctic ice, creating a gigantic Ice Monster, who Krang unleashes on the city to help him steal thermal nuclear devices to free the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Cuts Loose
programme.desc: Muscleman fiend Wally Airhead captures Turtles with a runaway exercise machine trap to add their powers to his race of super musclemen, but Turtles escape.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pirate Radio
programme.desc: Krang plots to take city by luring citizens into an inter­dimensional "Krang's Chasm" at sea by inserting Shredder in place of DJ. Dickie Bark as a Pied Piper on steamship radio station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Raphael disguises himself as Mad Dog McNutt, who is planning a heist of the Natural History museum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo, the Renaissance Turtle
programme.desc: Professor Mindbender fools the Mayor into installing Lex, a supercop robot, to clean up crime, but rewires him to arrest practically the whole city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Zach and the Alien Invaders
programme.desc: Zach's over-active imagination has him seeing Aliens everywhere. Sent to Military School, he discovers actual Aliens posing as officers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Welcome Back, Polarisoids!
programme.desc: The Polarisoids return to Earth unwittingly invited by Krang, bringing to life the alien Creatures caught as images on tape as a distraction so Krang can break into the city's computer systems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtleloids: Part 1
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder transport to the City Wild Animal Park with Bebop and Rocksteady to create an army of Mutants from the animals there.

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.

programme.title: Hector and the Search for Happiness
programme.desc: Newly divorced Sarah and her daughter Elissa seek a fresh start in a new town. But when startling and unexplainable events begin to happen, they're pulled into a mystery more dangerous than they ever imagined.

programme.title: The Big Wedding
programme.desc: A modern family tries to survive a weekend wedding celebration that has the potential to become a full-blown fiasco in this uproarious romantic comedy with an all-star cast.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Montreal Part 3 of 3
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues at Playground Poker Club with WPT Montreal.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Five Diamond World Poker Classic Part 1 of 3
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues at the luxurious Bellagio in Las Vegas, where WPT champion and chip leader Kevin Eyster competes against Jake Schwartz.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Five Diamond World Poker Classic
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues at the luxurious Bellagio in Las Vegas, where WPT champion and chip leader Kevin Eyster competes against Jake Schwartz.

programme.title: Uptown Girls: Uptown Girls (2003)
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: How To Be A Latin Lover
programme.desc: Eugenio Derbez (INSTRUCTIONS NOT INCLUDED) and Salma Hayek head an all-star cast in this hilarious comedy about an aging ladies’ man who learns that love and trust must be earned.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Oren, grieving his wife, shuns kindness. Leah, mourning her husband, pours her soul into singing. Oren's son leaves Sarah with him. Despite their loneliness, Sarah may spark a transformation, turning their home into a Little Shangri-La.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: Twisted family drama with shocking horror elements.

programme.title: Orgy of the Dead
programme.desc: A couple driving to a cemetery looking for inspiration for a horror story encounters the dancing dead.

programme.title: The Torture Chamber Of Dr. Sadism
programme.desc: German gothic horror with psychedelic visuals.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A condemned man makes a drastic decision when he realized attempts to thwart his hanging would cause a bloody conflict.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Gil Favor is shot in the back when he refuses to accept a beautiful woman's story that she is innocent of a murder charge.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: The drovers hire a man they later learn is a fugitive from a U.S. Army general court martial.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A strange Indian tribe captures Hey Soos and forces him to drink a non-fatal poison.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Gil Favor unwittingly involves his drovers in a scheme which finds them working fora railroad instead of herding cattle.

programme.title: Good Guys Wear Black
programme.desc: Action superstar Chuck Norris stars as John T. Booker, the former leader of an elite commando unit who must uncover the reason why his former squad members are being systematically murdered one by one. Anne Archer and James Franciscus co-star.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: When a stakeout marred by mob interference results in the death of an innocent bystander and a police cover-up, a Chicago detective is forced to adhere to his own personal code of ethics in an effort to rid the Windy City of its Warring crime factions.

programme.title: War (2007)
programme.desc: A full-throttle, martial arts thriller, WAR stars Jet Li and Jason Statham as two adversaries set on a violent collision course in the Asian mob underground.

programme.title: Inspired To Kill
programme.desc: When an aspiring mystery writer finds a perfect mentor, she finds herself in an all too real story of murder.

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: When Dr. Hillary Spenser saves the life of Gregory Lipton, he becomes dangerously obsessed with her, threatening the good doctor and all those in her life.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: When Patricia is called to identify a body, she’s shocked to find her mirror image lying dead on a gurney. Determined to find out more about her surprise ‘twin’ and simultaneously, help her mother clear her father's name.

programme.title: Living in Fear
programme.desc: A newly married bride travels to her husband's hometown for the reading of his father's will. When she discovers that the townspeople suspect her husband of a murder committed twenty years ago, she has her doubts about the man she's committed her life to.

programme.title: Earthling
programme.desc: After a mysterious atmospheric event, a small group of people wake up to realize that their entire lives have been a lie. They are in fact aliens disguised as humans. Now they have to make a choice. Live amongst men, or try to find a way back home.

programme.title: Futra Days
programme.desc: After undergoing an experimental time travel "process" that sends a man into his future, he investigates the man he has become, by engaging in a romance with his future self's girlfriend in a mind-bending reality.

programme.title: Extraterrestrial
programme.desc: A group of friends on a weekend trip to a cabin in the woods find themselves terrorized by alien visitors. Starring: Brittany Allen, Freddie Stroma, Jesse Moss

programme.title: Hansel & Gretel
programme.desc: In this fantastical retelling of the classic tale, two teenage siblings must escape from an evil recluse living in the woods. Starring Taylor Momsen ("Gossip Girl"), Dakota Fanning ("Twilight"), Jacob Smith and Lynn Redgrave.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: Ghosthunters On Icy Trails
programme.desc: Tom stumbles upon a slimy green ghost, Hugo, inhabiting the cellar of his house. Hugo needs Tom's help to defeat a dangerous Ancient Ice Ghost that has banished him from his haunted house.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Better Homes and Condos
programme.desc: (S05E017) Kimberly pulls Michael from the wrecked vehicle while Megan calls for help. Michael experiences internal bleeding and flatlines.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Great Sexpectations

programme.title: Andromeda: The Shards of Rimni

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Argentina
programme.desc: A dairy farmer drives his Mad Max style lorry - half bus, half tractor - through swamped lagoons to deliver his farm's milk.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Ethiopia

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Madagascar Red Island

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Buffalo Air

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7

programme.title: Arthur

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble

programme.title: War Story: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany
programme.desc: In mid-September 1944, the remnants of the battered 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion participated in the largest parachute drop in history, fought a successful battle.

programme.title: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: War Story: Buchenwald Airmen
programme.desc: For two months in 1944, 168 Allied airmen were shot down over occupied France, betrayed to the Gestapo by the same collaborator, transported to the Nazi concentration and slave labour camp Buchenwald.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In the longest campaign of the Second World War, from 1939 to 1945, German submarines desperately try to sever Britain’s shipping lifeline across the Atlantic Ocean. Canada plays the central role in the campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Not One Step Back: The Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: In the summer of 1942, the Germans advance to seize the rich oilfields of the Caucasus. In their path, the city of Stalingrad, its Soviet defenders personally ordered by Stalin to “take not one step back".

programme.title: War Story: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Royal Canadian Air Force bombing operations play a crucial role in disrupting German infrastructure ahead of the Normandy invasion of June 1944. In the process, dozens of Canadian airmen are forced to bail out over occupied Belgium and France.

programme.title: War Story: Whistle for a Tiffy
programme.desc: From D-Day, Tactical Air Force fighter-bombers played a pivotal role in Allied battlefield success; Canadian soldiers knew they could always “whistle for a Tiffy”.

programme.title: War Story: Surviving Dieppe
programme.desc: The Dieppe assault of 19 August 1942 is the worst day in Canadian military history: in just 8 hours, 907 Canadians were killed. For 2,000 of their comrades, nearly three years of incarceration in German prison camps followed.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
